response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, along with modern tooling like Vitest and Docker. His work on high-traffic systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests) and AI-agent infrastructure aligns well with the role's primary and secondary stack requirements. While his backend experience leans toward Node.js and Dlang rather than Kotlin/Java, his adaptability and deep technical expertise in scalable systems and testing frameworks compensate for this gap. The lack of explicit mention of Nest.js and PostgreSQL/MySQL in recent roles is a minor concern, but his broad skill set suggests he can quickly adapt.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements.
Proven track record in high-performance, scalable systems (e.g., real-time metadata handling for millions of HTTP requests).
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and modern testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest), aligning with emerging trends in the role.
concerns: Limited recent experience with Nest.js, which is a primary stack requirement; may require ramp-up time.
Backend experience heavily weighted toward Node.js and Dlang; Kotlin/Java experience is less documented in recent roles.
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL/MySQL in recent roles, though SQL is listed in skills.

key_factors.factor: Scalable system experience and performance optimization
